sessions.title: INC27080102 — root cause located, handed off to infra team
sessions.summary: Re-investigated Astra Toyota TDMS activity-not-created with tenant access. Verified mapping is correct (187 attrs, schema deployed, payload contains required fields). Pipeline trace by businessUnitId revealed stream-combiner stopped consuming this BU on 2026-05-21 06:58 UTC — clean stop, no errors, while globally healthy at 209K hits/hour. Suspected Kafka consumer-group / partition issue. Drafted Slack handoff for infra/data team.

sessions.title: VoiceMode research — deferred install
sessions.summary: Reviewed VoiceMode (MIT-licensed MCP server adding voice STT/TTS to Claude Code) via /analyze on creator's YouTube demo. Decided to skip install: requires WSL2 on Windows, project is 3 weeks old, demos only on macOS, would duplicate existing /analyze local Whisper pipeline. Reinforced CLAUDE.md 'chewable chunks' conversational rule by adding it to mistakes-lessons.md after violating it multiple times in the discussion.
Investigate INC27665093 (Valio Oy 'valo' consent missing on CDC->CDP batch ingestion) and decide CDP-side vs CDC-side root cause
accomplishments: Did: Pulled CDC outbound payload from Gator (@type:request, callID 78f6731c71564adab07d87a3fdaeb0b9) — confirmed only 3 preferences (marketing.survey/email, terms.TermsOfService), no valo
Did: Verified CDP-side mapping for data event HLp2uGSFSgifiLqaY48J8w iterates $.preferences[] generically — would carry valo if CDC sent it
Did: Compared Hades profiles — auto-ingest profile y9oOzRAE...P has valo (purposeId HC5p0LI0E43DBHxbLWxZ5g), batch-ingest profile sRZHGa6l... (ciamId 1147493) does not
Did: Filed CXCDP-38893 (idx-cdp AddNestedPreferenceToList silent consent drop, 308K WARN/30d), assigned to Yedidyah, linked 'relates to' Shai's CXCDP-38896
Did: Wrote JUnit repro test (NestedPreferencesBugReproTest) demonstrating bug class, pushed branch bug/CXCDP-38893-idx-walker-silent-consent-drop, opened draft PR #29
Did: Posted reply on incident with verified SAP help URLs (configure-get-full-accounts-scheduled-ingestion-event + Preferences Object REST) and CDC-side checklist for customer
Did: Updated team KB (~/.cdp-investigate-knowledge/) with CDC docs root + reusable 'specific consent missing in CDP via batch event' investigation pattern
Did: Saved feedback memory feedback-verify-before-reversing-position.md after mid-session reversal cost time
nextSteps: Watch INC27665093 for customer follow-up after CDC team checks outbound config
Yedidyah/Shai to coordinate CXCDP-38893 + CXCDP-38896 fix; production-shape exact repro still pending

sessions.title: chub-slack-bot — May 27 flooding-fixes review fully shipped (M0+M1+M2+M3)
sessions.summary: Bot was offline 4 days after May 27 crash with `toPost is not defined` errors. Read the canonical 22-commit roadmap (pm-roadmap-health-reviewer.md) instead of the auto-handoff summary. Shipped all remaining M2+M3 work: H1 cursor-save circuit breaker, H3 newIssueCount split into regressionCount + freshFindingsPosted, H5 classifyError sanitizer, M2 review_requested dedup by event-id, M3 sweep atomic write, M4 parseDiffLines + only, M5 concurrency cap (max 3) + fetchWithBackoff, M6 addMonitoredRepo atomic, M7 callAI throws on empty content, Finding-M1 thread_id capture from /comments, L1 test refactor to call real function, L2 poller tests as integration, L3 detectDevDismissals stub deletion, L4 processed_events 500-cap, L5 alreadyReviewed throws on non-404, L6 sliceAtNewline UTF-16-safe. Anchored sweep test merged_at to Date.now()-24h to prevent date decay. 4 commits pushed (57b5b88, f80aa81, f3291c5, 4e2fbee), 46 vitest tests green, bot restarted on PID 31021. 5 leftovers acknowledged but out of scope (sweep.test.js refactor, dependabot vuln, regressionCount=0 first cycle, existing cursors lack thread_id).
